title: elatostema platyphyllum var. balansae
intro: Elatostema platyphyllum var. balansae is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as a type of polystichum or variegated elatostema. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate various health conditions. The health benefits of Elatostema platyphyllum var. balansae are said to include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
